external_inference_policy.legacy_role: with-LINCS native artifacts: comparison and audit only; not for official external inference reporting.
external_inference_policy.why_with_vs_no_lincs_comparison_showed_z: XGBoost training bundle feature_columns omit LINCS, so XGB does not consume LINCS at inference. ResidualMLP and GCN checkpoints include LINCS slots in feat_cols; build_final_ensemble_ranking.py zero-pads missing LINCS columns to match tensor width. In this run, with-LINCS FE produced LINCS values that were effectively identical to that zero-padded path, so rankings matched explicit no-LINCS FE.
external_inference_policy.operational_next_steps: Use no-LINCS ranking for Top30/Top10 operational shortlists; proceed to direct molecular ADMET.
external_inference_policy.future_experiment_track_memo: Deferred optional track: with-LINCS full retraining (XGBoost + ResidualMLP + GCN) with LINCS in the training feature schema and aligned scalers/graph dimensions — separate from current no-LINCS external inference policy.

note: Pairs subset: 40 MB samples x 50 drugs (see native_inputs metabric_gene_order_summary.json). Full 1980x597 cross-join is ~1.18M rows — use prepare_metabric_native_inputs.py with caps 0 for all.
